mapper.insert: insert into kh_article_tag_health (value, resource_type, tag, description, update_time) values (#{value,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{resourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: select value, resource_type, tag, description, update_time from kh_article_tag_health
